# Vendored FunPayAPI

This directory contains the `FunPayAPI` package copied from:

- Repository: `https://github.com/sidor0912/FunPayCardinal`
- Upstream commit: `8b52a855f242da854806ef09ab1691b53d5d20a9`
- Copied path: `FunPayAPI/`

It is vendored because the current FunPayCardinal repository is an application repo, not a clean installable Python package for only `FunPayAPI`.
